settings.title: Application Settings
settings.subtitle: LLM model, prompts and analysis weights configuration
settings.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to default?

dpo.title: DPO Contact Information
dpo.description: Configure Data Protection Officer and firm contact information for GDPR consent emails.
dpo.infoContent: This information will be used in GDPR consent request emails sent to candidates. The DPO email will be provided as the contact for exercising data protection rights.

gdpr.title: GDPR Configuration
gdpr.description: Configure automatic consent request emails for CV storage.
gdpr.confirmDisconnect: Are you sure you want to disconnect this Gmail account?
gdpr.info1: This Gmail account will be used to send GDPR consent requests to external candidates
gdpr.info2: Emails are sent automatically when adding an external CV
gdpr.info3: A reminder is sent after 7 days if the candidate hasn't responded

apiDocs.title: API Documentation
apiDocs.description: Access the interactive API documentation powered by Swagger/OpenAPI.
apiDocs.swaggerUiDescription: Interactive API explorer with all endpoints documented
apiDocs.openApiJsonDescription: Raw OpenAPI 3.0 specification in JSON format

backup.title: Database Backup
backup.description: Configure automatic database backups via FTP or SFTP.
backup.restoreConfirm: Are you sure you want to restore this backup? This will overwrite all current database data.
backup.restoreWarning: Restoring a backup will overwrite all current database data. This action is irreversible. Make sure you have a recent backup before proceeding.
backup.tlsHelp: Explicit = like FileZilla. Implicit = direct TLS connection.

llm.title: LLM Model Configuration
llm.description: Select the LLM provider and model to use for resume analysis and improvement.
llm.ollamaDescription: Configure only your Ollama host address. The active model will be detected automatically on your machine.
llm.glmDescription: Select a GLM model. The application will use the server-side OpenAI-compatible Z.AI API.
llm.cvModeNominativeDescription: The improved CV will contain all personal information of the candidate (full name, contact details, etc.).
llm.cvModeAnonymousDescription: The improved CV will be anonymized: only the candidate's trigram will be displayed, without identifying personal information.
llm.webglEnabledDescription: Displays animated visual backgrounds when the browser and device support them.
llm.minimaxDescription: Select a MiniMax model. The application will use the server-side MiniMax API.
llm.deepseekDescription: Select the DeepSeek API mode to use. The callable IDs remain deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner, both currently mapped to DeepSeek-V3.2 on the API side.
llm.minimaxHighspeedDisabled: MiniMax highspeed models are hidden because this instance does not enable the Highspeed plan.
llm.minimaxRuntimeUnavailable: Some MiniMax models are temporarily hidden because the upstream refused them for this instance.
llm.runtimeUnavailable: Some models for this provider are temporarily hidden because the upstream refused them for this instance.
llm.ollamaHelp: Provide the full URL of your remote Ollama instance. The active model will be used automatically.

prompts.title: Prompts Configuration
prompts.description: Customize the prompts used for resume analysis and improvement. Leave empty to use default prompts.
prompts.preAnalysisEnabledHelp: Runs a server-side cleanup and light structuring pass on extracted text before the main analysis.
prompts.preAnalysisHelp: This prompt is used to clean and minimally restructure native or OCR extraction before the analysis pass.
prompts.analysisHelp: This prompt is used to analyze the resume and generate scores.
prompts.improvementHelp: This prompt is used to improve the resume based on the analysis.
prompts.matchAnalysisHelp: This prompt analyzes the match between a resume and a mission.
prompts.adaptationHelp: This prompt adapts the resume to maximize the match with the mission.

weights.title: Analysis Category Weights
weights.description: Define the importance of each category in the overall score. The sum must equal 100%.
weights.mustEqual100: The sum of weights must equal 100%
weights.totalMustEqualCurrent: The sum of weights must equal 100% (currently: {{total}}%)
weights.localRankingDescription: Configure the local pre-ranking weights used before sending profiles to the LLM.

chatbot.title: Chatbot Configuration
chatbot.description: Manage the availability of the AI assistant for application users.
chatbot.enableDescription: Allows users to access the assistance chatbot to get help using the application.
chatbot.publicHomeDescription: Shows /welcome to unauthenticated visitors instead of redirecting them straight to sign-in.
chatbot.statusEnabledInfo: Users can access the chatbot via the button at the bottom right
chatbot.statusDisabledInfo: The chatbot is hidden for all users
chatbot.publicHomeEnabledInfo: Unauthenticated visitors land on the public home page
chatbot.publicHomeDisabledInfo: Unauthenticated visitors are redirected to the sign-in page
chatbot.info1: The chatbot uses the LLM model configured in the 'LLM Model' tab
chatbot.info2: It has access to the complete user guide to provide contextual assistance
chatbot.info3: Conversations are not saved and remain private
